title: Behind Every Drop, A Story of Empowerment
didYouKnow: When you taste Shahi Litchi from Muzaffarpur, you're tasting a GI-tagged legend for its famed sweetness and aroma - now in Dabur Litchi Honey.
caption: Crafted in partnership with JEEViKA, a Bihar Government initiative supporting rural women livelihoods.

title: Behind Every Drop, A Story of Empowerment
didYouKnow: You're enjoying something rare: honey bees are the only insects that regularly make food for humans.
caption: Crafted in partnership with JEEViKA, a Bihar Government initiative supporting rural women livelihoods.

title: Behind Every Drop, A Story of Empowerment
didYouKnow: Every spoon of litchi honey holds the work of bees visiting millions of flowers over incredible distances equal to three times around the Earth.
caption: Crafted in partnership with JEEViKA, a Bihar Government initiative supporting rural women livelihoods.
